title: Question about create_timeline_item API function Input?
excerpt:
I receive a “Summary is too long.” error when using create_timeline_item function. 
What is the maximum length of the summary input of the create_timeline_item function?

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I receive a “Summary is too long.” error when using create_timeline_item function.

What is the maximum length of the summary input of the create_timeline_item function?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there!

The maximum length for the summary is 255 characters

I will speak with the team so that it can be added to our doc!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Amarin (Amarin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias
Thank you for the quick reply!
greetings from Switzerland
Amarin
